message:
fix: return error from waiters JSON marshal instead of discarding (bd-57ab)

json.Marshal(value) for the waiters field was discarding the error with '_'
in both wisps.go and transaction.go. If marshaling failed (e.g., value
contains an unsupported type), an empty/invalid JSON string would be written
to the database, silently corrupting the waiters field.

Now returns fmt.Errorf("invalid waiters: %w", err) on marshal failure.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/flint
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
